name: Medianyky (Honey Cookies)
recipeIngredient: 1 large Egg, beaten with a little
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, spices, powdered sugar, and baking powder together until well combined.
2. Add the eggs, honey, and orange peel to the sifted ingredients to form a soft dough.
3. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to about 1/2-inch thickness.
4. Cut into shapes using cookie cutters and place on a lightly greased or non-stick baking sheet.
5. Brush each cookie with egg wash glaze.
6. Place half an almond in the center of each cookie and sprinkle with sugar crystals.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 15 minutes, until done.
8. Allow to cool on wire racks before storing in airtight tins.
